system.notes:
Corrupt Bailiff, City Law

Milos has access to trial evidence, and to prisoners awaiting trial. He can't get people out, but he can silence them. He has a network of corrupt peers, judges, bluecoats, and others so he can trade favors to accomplish the impossible. Huge and greasy, he is built like a bull and he enjoys the scent of fear.

Controlling Milos could mean protecting or killing someone in bluecoat custody. An endless stream of people want revenge on him, and a more select group would like to control or use him.
